enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.vo: Teleports to safety when falling into void
enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.ex: Extra XP on kills, +100% per level
enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.sp: Speed gradually increases while sprinting, up to +50%
enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.na: Repairs over time, cooldown decreases with level
enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.sm: Mined ores drop ingots, sand drops glass (affected by Fortune)
enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.ni: Permanent night vision when worn on head
enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.pi: Kills drop extra emeralds, +1 per level
enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.re: Item stays with you after death, keeping its slot
enchantment.morepracticalenchantments.le: Hold forward while gliding to gain speed
